title: GovDataContractBench: Benchmark for Multi-Layer Contract-Drift Detection
description: GovDataContractBench is a reproducible benchmark artifact for studying multi-layer contract-drift detection on public OpenAPI, CKAN, and FHIR artifacts. This release contains the benchmark code, public-data snapshot, generated mutation cases, detector metrics, natural-drift analysis outputs, and reproduction instructions used for the EISEJ manuscript.
